name: Pocketr
description: Self-hosted personal finance and household budgeting app that helps individuals and families track spending, organize accounts, understand trends, and improve long-term financial health.

notes.text: Create the first user by registering from the web interface.
The script installs the published Pocketr release jar, which includes the built Vue frontend.

By default the script installs PostgreSQL locally using the shared helper default. Choose Advanced Install to select an external PostgreSQL database or an optional local PostgreSQL major version. For unattended local installs, set `POCKETR_PG_VERSION`. For unattended external installs, set `POCKETR_DB_MODE=external`, `POCKETR_DB_URL`, `POCKETR_DB_USERNAME`, and `POCKETR_DB_PASSWORD`. The external database must already exist, accept connections, and allow the Pocketr user to create tables in the public schema.
For local PostgreSQL installs, generated database credentials are saved to `~/pocketr.creds`. Runtime configuration is in `/opt/pocketr/.env`.
